articles.title: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US resumes blockade of Iran ports
articles.summary: Trump drops a 24-hour-old vow to charge cargo ships for using the Strait as the US continues its battle to break Iran's hold on the waterway.

articles.title: Trump retreat over Hormuz tolls suggests he is struggling to end Iran war
articles.summary: The abrupt about-face from the US president was the latest twist in a conflict that has now lasted more than four months.

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz 'faultline' exposes weakness of the US-Iran deal
articles.summary: Control of the waterway has become a key point of contention between the US and Iran, as a ceasefire deal falters.

articles.title: Seven Britons among those killed in Spain wildfires
articles.summary: Twelve of the 13 victims were foreign nationals, Spanish authorities said on Tuesday.

articles.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
articles.summary: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".

articles.title: Diamond giant De Beers halts work at flagship South African mine as demand plummets
articles.summary: Production will stop for two years at the mine which employs more than 4,000 people.

articles.title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
articles.summary: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".

articles.title: Trump pays writer E Jean Carroll $5m in damages over sexual abuse and defamation
articles.summary: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.

articles.title: Tyrannosaurus rex most expensive dinosaur ever sold
articles.summary: The dinosaur skeleton, which roamed the planet 67 million years ago, was sold by Sotheby's in New York.

articles.title: US Congress takes next step to make daylight saving time permanent
articles.summary: The House of Representatives passed a Trump-backed bill that would end decades of Americans having to reset their clocks twice a year.
